sourcesContent:
export default function CartDrawer({ cart, onClose, onCheckout }) { const formatINR = (amount) => new Intl.NumberFormat('en-IN', { style: 'currency', currency: 'INR', maximumFractionDigits: 0 }).format(amount); // Calculate totals const itemsTotal = cart.reduce((sum, item) => sum + item.price, 0); const originalTotal = cart.reduce((sum, item) => sum + item.originalPrice, 0); const savings = originalTotal - itemsTotal; const deliveryCharge = 0; // Free for now const handlingCharge = 2; const grandTotal = itemsTotal + handlingCharge + deliveryCharge; return (
My Cart Share
Your total savings {formatINR(savings)}
⏱️ Delivery in 11 minutes
Shipment of {cart.length} item{cart.length !== 1 ? 's' : ''}
{cart.map((item, idx) => (
{item.name}
{item.volume}
{formatINR(item.price)}
{/* Quantity controls can be added here */} 1
))}
Bill details
Items total Saved {formatINR(savings)} {formatINR(originalTotal)} {formatINR(itemsTotal)}
Delivery charge FREE
Handling charge {formatINR(handlingCharge)}
Grand total {formatINR(grandTotal)}
Your total savings {formatINR(savings)}
Cancellation Policy
Orders cannot be cancelled once packed for delivery. In case of unexpected delays, a refund will be provided, if applicable.
); }
